item.title: Reports
item.description: DTEX publishes comprehensive insider risk management reports, from the cost of insider threats to nation-state operations and more.

item.title: Case Study: DTEX Helps a Telecom Company Cut Through the Noise to Focus on What Matters Most
item.description: A major telecom company based in the Asia-Pacific region had launched a large-scale publicly funded project to upgrade its telecommunications

item.title: DTEX Wins “Most Innovative Data Loss Prevention” and “Publisher’s Choice Insider Threat Prevention” in Global InfoSec Awards During RSA Conference 2022
item.description: DTEX Wins "Most Innovative Data Loss Prevention" and "Publisher’s Choice Insider Threat Prevention" in Global InfoSec Awards.

item.title: Exploring the Gartner Rule of Three for Proactive Insider Risk Management
item.description: Read our blog post for a discussion on Gartner's recent report, The Rule of Three for Proactive Insider Risk Management.

item.title: DTEX Named Best-in-Class UEBA Solution in 2021 GigaOm Radar Report
item.description: GigaOm's 2021 Radar Report for user and entity behavior analytics (UEBA) has us leading the pack. Find out more about the report now.

item.title: Top Challenges to Managing Insider Threats
item.description: Many organizations face difficulties in developing and maintaining an insider threat program. Here we talk about some of the most prevalent obstacles.

item.title: What Is a Next-Gen Insider Threat Solution?
item.description: In the past, insider threat management used “point solutions" for specific issues. Now, next-gen products must address human activity & intent.

item.title: UEBA Redemption: Identifying Indicators of Intent
item.description: Part one of this series on how DTEX addresses the shortcomings of UEBA technology provides a deep dive into the "data" layer of DMAP+.

item.title: New Forrester Research says ‘Motivations & Indicators’ are Key to Mitigating Insider Threats
item.description: The latest Forrester research offers 3 key takeaways for security & outlines best practices for designing, implementing & administering an insider threat program.

item.title: 10 Tips to Strengthen Your Insider Threat Program – Data, Intent and Context [Part 1]
item.description: When building an insider threat program, the same 10 building blocks hold true for everyone. Read this blog post to learn how to strengthen your InT program and prevent data exfiltration.

item.title: Insiders Strike Again at Tesla… or did they?
item.description: News broke on Jan 22 that Tesla has filed a federal lawsuit accusing Alex Khatilov of stealing upwards of 26,000 highly sensitive company files. Learn more here.

item.title: Full Visibility and the Insider Threat Kill Chain: Why it is Critical to See Every Stage
item.description: The insider risks are widely acknowledged, well-documented & increasingly prioritized. Why still challenging then? The Insider Threat Kill Chain may be key.

item.title: Modern Insider Threat Management: Machine Learning as a Non-Negotiable
item.description: When it comes to cybersecurity, machine learning capabilities are actively being integrated into advanced systems; platforms despite serving as a buzzword too.

item.title: Thoughts on Gartner’s 2022 Market Guide for Data Loss Prevention
item.description: Gartner has just released their 2022 Market Guide for data loss prevention and we are excited to share our thoughts on the latest solutions.

item.title: The Cost of Ownership Demands Attention: Choosing the Right Tool for IRM
item.description: Making sure your tools are working for you is critical to success, especially when choosing the right tool for insider risk management.

item.title: 2020 Insider Threat Report – Conclusion
item.description: The 2020 DTEX Insider Threat Report has revealed a blind spot in the Work-From-Home movement in employee behavior.

item.title: The Insider Threat Kill Chain – Obfuscation
item.description: In cybersecurity, the kill chain refers to the sequential steps an adversary must complete in a successful attack. Learn how to stop the attack at any point here.

item.title: The Insider Threat Kill Chain – Reconnaissance
item.description: It is increasingly difficult to defend against attacks, leading security teams to accept the inevitability of infiltration but then adopt “kill chain” defenses.

item.title: What is the Insider Threat Kill Chain
item.description: The “Kill Chain” in information security refers to sequential steps an adversary must complete in a successful attack. Learn how it relates to warfare and more.

item.title: The True Price Tag of Insider Threats: Findings from the New 2016 Cost of Insider Threats Report
item.description: Insider threat is a security issue that's constantly floating in limbo... for too many organizations, it just isn't a pressing priority despite its significance.

item.title: How AI Layoffs and Job Hugging Create Insider Risk, and What Security Teams Can Do About It
item.description: AI layoffs and "job hugging" are increasing insider risk. Learn how insider risk management and HR can prevent data loss.

item.title: 2026 Cybersecurity Predictions: Insider Risk, AI Security, and the Future of Work
item.description: Here are DTEX’s 2026 cybersecurity predictions, grounded in what we’ve seen across customers, investigations, and global environments.

item.title: Insider Risk Mitigation Strategies for the Midsize Enterprise
item.description: The team at Gartner recently its Strategies for Midsize Enterprises to Mitigate Insider Risk. Here are the takeaways.

item.title: CyberBytes Recap: The Insider Threat and the Real Risk to Enterprises
item.description: In this CyberBytes episode, Armaan Mahbod of DTEX i3 reveals all about the insider threat and the real risk to enterprises.

item.title: DTEX Insider Risk News Digest – Q2, 2023
item.description: It has been an eventful quarter at DTEX, and we expect that it won’t slow down any time soon.

item.title: DTEX Named “Most Comprehensive Insider Threat Prevention” in Global InfoSec Awards
item.description: We are thrilled to kick off the 2023 RSA Conference with 2 award wins from CDM: Most Comprehensive Insider Threat Prevention & Best Product Data Loss Prevention.

item.title: Insider Risk: The Next Partner Opportunity
item.description: Channel partners have a great opportunity to maximize the growing insider risk opportunity through a range of professional services.

item.title: Get Left of BOOM by Focusing on Users and Data
item.description: Intent is the missing piece of the insider risk puzzle. Understanding intent enables proactive intervention, left of boom.

item.title: Insider Risk: When Business Gets Personal
item.description: In an ideal world, there is a clear delineation of where personal and professional engagements take place: anything business related transpires on

item.title: Remote Workforce Analytics With Remote Workforce Trust
item.description: Understand your remote workforce engagement while maintaining employee trust with workforce cyber intelligence.
